editions.effect:
**Ranged 3**

[Class Bonus] At the beginning of your recollection phase, banish up to three fire element cards from your graveyard. For each card banished this way,  CARDNAME gains **ranged 3** %%until end of turn%. *(Multiple instances of **ranged** stack.)*
